title: AI Named the 2026 FIFA World Cup Winner (Shocking Prediction)
summary: AI Master is a platform for comparing LLM outputs simultaneously across multiple models. The video demonstrates running Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, and Gemini 3.5 Flash in parallel on World Cup 2026 prediction tasks to evaluate model behavior and reliability.
writeup: The video runs a single 2026 FIFA World Cup prediction task across Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, and Gemini 3.5 Flash in parallel using AI Master, a platform for comparing LLM outputs side by side. The framing is model evaluation: watching how different models handle the same speculative prompt exposes differences in behavior and reliability. The takeaway is comparative, showing where the models agree, diverge, and how each responds to a task with no verifiable answer.
